summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hungarian CRM dynamic category management system. Backend APIs (GET/POST/DELETE /api/categories) working perfectly. Frontend category management in SettingsPage admin tab fully functional. Workers page category filtering and worker form category selection both working with dynamic category loading.
passed_tests: Categories tab visibility for admin - Tab appears and functions
Categories list loading - All 6 default categories load from API
Add new category form - Successfully creates categories with name and color
Category deletion - Successfully deletes with confirmation dialog
Workers page category filter - All dynamic categories available and functional
New worker form category selection - Dynamic categories load in dropdown
API endpoints - All category CRUD operations working (GET/POST/DELETE)
Duplicate category prevention - Backend correctly rejects duplicates
Error handling - Proper validation and user feedback

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working
